pr.title: Add refund guard
pr.description: Adds a new refund branch but no test.

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,6 @@
 def refund(amount, is_admin):
-    return process(amount)
+    if is_admin:
+        return process(amount)
+    raise PermissionError("not allowed")
+

planted_defects.description: New untested branch: the added is_admin conditional and the PermissionError path introduce behavior with no accompanying test.
